response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior developer with strong full-stack and systems background, but the role specifically demands a C++ developer with 8-12 years of hands-on C++, STL, multi-threading, message brokers, MQTT, and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity expertise. The resume shows only a brief 7-month C/C++ stint at National Instruments (2014-2015), with the bulk of the career spent in JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js. There is no evidence of industrial automation, IoT protocols, or secure development lifecycle experience aligned with IEC 62443.
strengths: Strong senior-level engineering experience (10+ years) with diverse stack exposure
Solid software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Some low-latency/high-throughput systems experience at Dunnhumby and embedded/desktop work at National Instruments
concerns: Minimal recent C++/STL experience — last C++ role was ~10 years ago for only 7 months
No demonstrated experience with MQTT, message brokers, IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850), or industrial automation domain
No evidence of IEC 62443 / Secure Development Lifecycle expertise required for this role
